hero.title: LinkedIn Bio Optimizer
hero.description: Create, improve, and manage LinkedIn bios with professional profile context, reusable templates, and saved versions.

flow.title: Bios → Templates → Versions
steps: Use reusable templates for career goals

differences.title: Keep LinkedIn bio work structured
differences.description: LinkedIn Bio Optimizer keeps profile context, target role, keywords, templates, and version history connected in one protected workflow.

items.title: Profile context
items.description: Capture industry, career level, target role, headline, current bio, tone, and keywords.

items.title: Template reuse
items.description: Store reusable bio templates by industry and career level.

items.title: Version history
items.description: Save optimized headline and bio versions with change summaries.

feel.title: A focused professional bio desk

items.title: Save versions
